data.title: Law of Simplicity
data.description: Focuses on a clean, intuitive interface that ensures ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design with clear iconography and straightforward navigation.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies decision-making by reducing the number of choices presented to users.
data.technical_spec: Quick-access menus and shortcut gestures expedite user interactions.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Larger, easily tappable touch targets enhance usability, especially on mobile devices.
data.technical_spec: Adaptive touch target sizing for various device form factors.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A visually appealing design is perceived as more usable, fostering a positive user experience.
data.technical_spec: Consistent and harmonious color schemes and typography.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Users prefer your website to work the same way as all the other sites they already know.
data.technical_spec: Leverages familiar UI patterns for navigation and messaging.
